'''IG-182''' was an [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|IG-100 MagnaGuard]] that survived the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it fell into the service of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[4-8C]] as a bodyguard.

{{Droid-stub}}
